boundary: This page is the public v1.0 RTX app status index. It lists bounded NVIDIA OptiX/RTX claim-review candidates and non-claim boundaries. It is not release authorization and not a public speedup claim.
goal: Goal947 v1.0 RTX app status page

reviewed_public_wording_rows.scope: prepared fixed-radius scalar threshold-count sub-path only
prepared fixed-radius scalar core-count sub-path only
prepared native segment/polygon hit-count traversal only
prepared bounded native pair-row traversal only
prepared ANN candidate-coverage decision sub-path only

rows.allowed_claim: prepared DB compact-summary traversal/filter/grouping sub-path may enter claim review; no DBMS or SQL-engine speedup claim
rows.cloud_action: no readiness pod needed; rerun only in a consolidated regression/tuning batch
rows.native_continuation_contract: native continuation only for materialization-free compact DB summaries
rows.non_claim_boundary: DB claims must stay limited to compact-summary prepared sub-paths; no SQL engine, DBMS, full dashboard, row-materializing, or broad whole-app speedup claim is allowed
rows.public_wording: No Goal1009 public speedup wording has been reviewed for this app path yet.
rows.public_wording_boundary: Prepared DB compact-summary traversal/filter/grouping is RT-core ready, but no public speedup wording is authorized yet.

rows.allowed_claim: bounded graph visibility any-hit plus native BFS/triangle graph-ray candidate-generation sub-paths may enter claim review; no whole-app graph speedup claim
rows.cloud_action: no readiness pod needed; rerun only in a consolidated regression/tuning batch
rows.native_continuation_contract: top-level metadata aggregates selected native graph sections; visibility_edges uses optix_visibility_pair_rows on OptiX
rows.non_claim_boundary: Goal929 covers bounded graph RT sub-paths only; CPU-side frontier bookkeeping, triangle set-intersection, shortest-path, graph database, distributed analytics, and whole-app graph-system acceleration remain outside the claim
rows.public_wording: No Goal1009 public speedup wording has been reviewed for this app path yet.
rows.public_wording_boundary: Bounded graph visibility and graph-ray candidate-generation sub-paths are RT-core ready, but no public speedup wording is authorized yet.
rows.rt_core_subpath: bounded visibility any-hit plus native graph-ray BFS/triangle candidate generation
